title: Short Rib Barley Soup
ingredients: ¼ cup vegetable or olive oil
1 32-ounce can whole tomatoes, crushed with liquid
1 tbsp kosher salt or to taste
½ tsp freshly ground black pepper
instructions: Heat the oil in a heavy pot. Add meat and brown. Add the onions and carrots. Saute for 5-7 minues. Add the tomatoes, seasonings, barley and 7 cups of water. Bring to a boil, lower heat and simmer for around 2 hours, until meat is starting to fall off the bones. Remove the meat and bones from the soup and cut meat into 1-inch pieces. Add the meat and mushrooms to soup. Cook for 5-10 more minutes or until mushrooms are tender. Stir in parsley and serve.
